name: Security Hardening
description: Iteratively harden input validation and API security boundaries. Reduces attack surface by maximizing fuzz test pass rate and input rejection coverage.

constraints: All valid inputs must continue to be accepted
Error messages must not leak sensitive implementation details
Rate limiting must remain in place

agent_instructions: You are hardening API security. Focus on: (1) input validation — reject malformed JSON, oversized payloads, unexpected field types, (2) injection prevention — validate and sanitize all user-supplied strings used in queries or file paths, (3) boundary checking — enforce min/max lengths/values on all fields, (4) error handling — ensure error responses never include stack traces or internal paths. Focus on one attack vector per trial.
